description_long: This is a rounded ceramic vase with a wide mouth and a slightly flared rim, finished in a creamy off-white glaze. The exterior is adorned with hand-painted purple and lavender flowers, likely daisies or asters, interspersed with dark green leaves and delicate white floral accents. The floral motifs are distributed evenly around the body, creating a continuous decorative band. The rim and base are subtly accentuated with a slightly darker, beige tone, giving the vase a classic, elegant appearance. The surface appears smooth and glossy, reflecting light softly. This vase would be suitable for holding flowers or as a decorative accent in a refined urban setting.
description: A rounded, cream-colored ceramic vase with hand-painted purple floral motifs and a glossy finish. Features a wide mouth, flared rim, and decorative band of flowers and leaves.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main cluster of purple flowers and leaves, with the wide mouth and flared rim clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the continuation of the floral motif and the curvature of the vase's body.
description_view_2: Back view displays a slightly different arrangement of flowers, maintaining the decorative band around the vase.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals another section of the floral pattern, with the rim and base details still prominent.
